name: Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of intelligent metering systems for the gas, water, and heat supply industries in China. The company offers multi-layer Internet of Things interactive metering platforms, Internet of Things interactive metering platforms, peer-to-peer interactive metering platforms, and IC card prepaid metering platforms, as well as city gas intelligent metering network charging system solutions. Hangzhou Innover Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
